CONTENT.References: Silkeborg ophæver med venstreback‚ bold.dk, 17 February 2016
CONTENT.Club career: Jónsson has played club football for Silkeborg and HB Tórshavn.In January 2018, Jónsson signed for Norwegian club Sandnes Ulf in OBOS-ligaen.
CONTENT.Personal life: Jónsson works as a Consultant in Betri Banki while also playing football.
CONTENT.International goals: Scores and results list Faroe Islands' goal tally first.
CONTENT.International career: He made his international debut for Faroe Islands in 2013.In 17 November 2020, Jónsson scores his first international goal against Malta in the 2020–21 UEFA Nations League D match during a 1–1 draw.

SUMMARY: Ári Mohr Jónsson (born 22 July 1994) is a Faroese international footballer who plays for HB Tórshavn, as a left-back. He has also played for the Danish club Silkeborg and the Norwegian club Sandnes Ulf.
